--- layout: default title: "How It Works" description: "A clear step-by-step recovery support process." ---

How It Works

  1. Research — identify potential unclaimed property records.
  2. Verification — confirm ownership using client documentation.
  3. Client authorization — proceed only with client approval.
  4. Claim submission support — help prepare and organize required materials.
  5. Recovery — client completes the final steps required by the holder or agency.

Important: Genesis Asset Solutions LLC is not affiliated with any government agency. We do not guarantee recovery amounts or timelines. Clients must verify ownership and review all submissions prior to completion.

NAP: Genesis Asset Solutions LLC | 888-506-2708 | dustin@genesisassetsolutions.com
